metric_value: Peter Kastner served as Executive Vice President, Research at Aberdeen Group in 2002 with direct line 617 854-5221 — biographical confirmation on the questionnaire's contact line.
Aberdeen framed participation as voluntary with confidentiality assurance ('your response will not be made public').

Questionnaire probes: (a) common launch process/methodology across product lines; (b) variations for hardware/software/services; (c) common front-end leading to tailored direct/channel launches; (d) separate launch organization vs marketing/ops/product management.

12 task categories for lead time measurement: beta testing end, product configurator ready, ERP/order management, globalization/internationalization, launch readiness review, release to manufacturing, pricing US signoff, pricing country/region, product literature, press/analyst materials, training materials, web site.
7 delivery methods prompted: hardcopy paper; web e-learning; web site; classroom; electronic documents (.pdf); intranet database; collaboration software.

7 material categories probed for delivery: direct sales training; indirect sales/channel training; announcement sales kit; international (languages); product literature; FAQs and Q&A; press materials.
